requirement_topic.en: CREG and Sonelgaz/GRTE Grid-Connection and Storage Authorisation Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: CREG与Sonelgaz/GRTE储能并网及授权要求
requirement_topic.zht: CREG與Sonelgaz/GRTE儲能併網及授權要求

summary.en: Algeria's electricity and gas regulator is the Commission de Régulation de l'Electricité et du Gaz (CREG), established under Loi 02-01 on electricity and gas distribution. The national utility and grid operator for transmission is Sonelgaz, whose transmission subsidiary GRTE (Gestionnaire du Réseau de Transport de l'Electricité) issues grid-connection approvals and technical specifications for generation and storage assets connected to the high-voltage network. A BESS connected to the Algerian grid must satisfy CREG's regulatory authorisation framework, GRTE's technical grid-connection requirements covering frequency response, voltage support, reactive-power control, protection coordination, anti-islanding, power quality, metering, and SCADA integration, and the 230/400 V 50 Hz system standard. For utility-scale BESS or storage projects attached to Algeria's Solar 1000 / 3000–4000 MW tender programmes, additional programme-specific connection approvals and energy-production agreements with Sonelgaz may be required. China's grid is nominally 220/380 V; the 10 V difference in phase voltage requires system configuration confirmation.
summary.zh: 阿尔及利亚电力和燃气监管机构为电力和燃气监管委员会（CREG），依据电力和燃气配电Loi 02-01设立。国家公用事业和输电电网运营商为Sonelgaz，其输电子公司GRTE（电力输电网络管理者）负责向接入高压网络的发电和储能资产颁发并网审批和技术规格。接入阿尔及利亚电网的BESS须满足CREG的监管授权框架、GRTE的并网技术要求（涵盖频率响应、电压支撑、无功控制、保护配合、防孤岛、电能质量、计量和SCADA集成），以及230/400 V 50 Hz系统标准。对于与阿尔及利亚Solar 1000/3000–4000 MW招标项目配套的公用事业规模BESS或储能项目，可能还需额外的项目特定接入审批和与Sonelgaz的发电协议。中国电网标称电压为220/380 V；相电压差10 V需要进行系统配置确认。
summary.zht: 阿爾及利亞電力和燃氣監管機構為電力和燃氣監管委員會（CREG），依據電力和燃氣配電Loi 02-01設立。國家公用事業和輸電電網營運商為Sonelgaz，其輸電子公司GRTE（電力輸電網絡管理者）負責向接入高壓網絡的發電和儲能資產頒發併網審批和技術規格。接入阿爾及利亞電網的BESS須滿足CREG的監管授權框架、GRTE的併網技術要求（涵蓋頻率響應、電壓支撐、無功控制、保護配合、防孤島、電能質量、計量和SCADA集成），以及230/400 V 50 Hz系統標準。對於與阿爾及利亞Solar 1000/3000–4000 MW招標項目配套的公用事業規模BESS或儲能項目，可能還需額外的項目特定接入審批和與Sonelgaz的發電協議。中國電網標稱電壓為220/380 V；相電壓差10 V需要進行系統配置確認。

standards_or_laws: Loi 02-01 du 5 février 2002 relative à l'électricité et à la distribution du gaz par canalisations (Algerian Electricity and Gas Act)
CREG regulatory framework for electricity production, storage, and grid-connection authorisation
GRTE technical grid-connection specifications for generation and storage assets
Sonelgaz/GRTE transmission grid code (230/400 V 50 Hz)
Algeria Solar 1000 and Solar 3000–4000 MW programme tender specifications (where applicable)
IEC 62933-5-1 / 62933-5-2 (referenced for system safety in international project-finance contexts)

summary.en: China BESS grid-connection evidence commonly references GB/T 36558-2023 (general technical requirements for electrochemical energy storage stations connected to power systems), GB/T 34120-2023 (electrochemical energy storage systems testing), and project-specific grid-connection study reports submitted to the local grid company (State Grid or China Southern Power Grid). These Chinese documents address technically similar requirements but do not substitute for CREG regulatory authorisation, Sonelgaz/GRTE grid-connection acceptance, or Algeria programme-specific tender compliance. China's 220/380 V nominal voltage differs from Algeria's 230/400 V system.
summary.zh: 中国BESS并网证据通常引用GB/T 36558-2023（接入电力系统的电化学储能电站通用技术要求）、GB/T 34120-2023（电化学储能系统测试）及提交给地方电网公司（国家电网或南方电网）的项目级并网研究报告。这些中国文件在技术上涵盖类似要求，但不能替代CREG监管授权、Sonelgaz/GRTE并网接受或阿尔及利亚项目特定招标合规。中国220/380 V标称电压与阿尔及利亚230/400 V系统有所不同。
summary.zht: 中國BESS併網證據通常引用GB/T 36558-2023（接入電力系統的電化學儲能電站通用技術要求）、GB/T 34120-2023（電化學儲能系統測試）及提交給地方電網公司（國家電網或南方電網）的項目級併網研究報告。這些中國文件在技術上涵蓋類似要求，但不能替代CREG監管授權、Sonelgaz/GRTE併網接受或阿爾及利亞項目特定招標合規。中國220/380 V標稱電壓與阿爾及利亞230/400 V系統有所不同。

standards_or_laws: NB/T 42090-2016 (grid-connected battery energy storage inverter technical specifications)
Chinese local grid company grid-connection study report

gap.en: Prepare an Algeria-specific grid studies package covering: frequency response capability and protection settings for the 50 Hz Algerian grid, voltage and reactive-power support for the 230/400 V system (confirm inverter and BMS configuration for 230/400 V rather than the Chinese 220/380 V default), protection relay coordination, anti-islanding for island-risk sites, metering and revenue measurement, SCADA and telemetry integration per GRTE requirements, and emergency shutdown capability. Obtain CREG regulatory authorisation for the storage activity and GRTE grid-connection approval before commissioning. Confirm project authorisation route under the relevant Sonelgaz Solar programme tender specifications.
gap.zh: 应准备阿尔及利亚特定并网研究文件包，涵盖：阿尔及利亚50 Hz电网频率响应能力与保护设置、230/400 V系统的电压和无功支撑（确认逆变器和BMS配置适配230/400 V而非中国220/380 V默认值）、保护继电器配合、孤岛风险站点防孤岛、计量与电费计量、按GRTE要求的SCADA和远动集成，以及紧急停机能力。调试前应取得储能业务的CREG监管授权和GRTE并网审批。应确认相关Sonelgaz太阳能项目招标规格下的项目授权路径。
gap.zht: 應準備阿爾及利亞特定併網研究文件包，涵蓋：阿爾及利亞50 Hz電網頻率響應能力與保護設定、230/400 V系統的電壓和無功支撐（確認逆變器和BMS配置適配230/400 V而非中國220/380 V預設值）、保護繼電器配合、孤島風險站點防孤島、計量與電費計量、按GRTE要求的SCADA和遠動集成，以及緊急停機能力。調試前應取得儲能業務的CREG監管授權和GRTE併網審批。應確認相關Sonelgaz太陽能項目招標規格下的項目授權路徑。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for any BESS connected to the Algerian grid under CREG regulatory framework and GRTE technical grid-connection rules; project authorisation under Loi 02-01 is legally required
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for Chinese grid-connected BESS under CNCA and grid company approval; not transferable as CREG or Sonelgaz/GRTE grid-connection authorisation

source.publisher: Commission de Régulation de l'Electricité et du Gaz (CREG), Algeria

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T 36558-2023 grid documentation does not satisfy CREG regulatory authorisation or Sonelgaz/GRTE grid-connection acceptance. Prepare an Algeria-specific grid studies package including 230/400 V 50 Hz system configuration verification, obtain CREG authorisation, and secure GRTE connection approval before commissioning.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T 36558-2023并网文件不满足CREG监管授权或Sonelgaz/GRTE并网接受要求。调试前应准备包含230/400 V 50 Hz系统配置验证的阿尔及利亚特定并网研究文件包，取得CREG授权并获得GRTE连接审批。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T 36558-2023併網文件不滿足CREG監管授權或Sonelgaz/GRTE併網接受要求。調試前應準備包含230/400 V 50 Hz系統配置驗證的阿爾及利亞特定併網研究文件包，取得CREG授權並獲得GRTE連接審批。
